pages.title: Mythical Wands
pages.text: The $(l)Mythical Tier$() is a new spell tier above Master. It represents the pinnacle of magical mastery, unlocking ancient powers. To reach this tier, you must craft the $(item)Mythical Arcane Tome$() at the Imbuement Altar.
Mythical wands are the most powerful wands ever created. They have higher mana capacity, faster regen, and can cast spells with increased potency
pages.title: Mythical Wands
